record.field: These incidents involve injury or death to people, damage to property, or environmental damage. Examples of safety incidents include workplace accidents, product defects, and environmental spills.
These incidents involve losses of money or other financial assets. Examples of financial incidents include fraud, embezzlement, and investment losses.

These incidents involve unauthorized access to or disclosure of sensitive information, damage to computer systems, or disruption of service.For examples incidents like cyberattacks, data breaches, and denial-of-service attacks.
